nodes.speaker: logo
nodes.text: [shake rate=20 level=10]Hello[/shake], I am a [wave]test made[/wave] for a [rainbow]JSON based[/rainbow] Dialogue System!

nodes.speaker: logo
nodes.text: Let's see if this works shall we?

nodes.speaker: logo
nodes.text: Wanna hear a pizza joke? Nevermind it's too [rainbow] cheesy! [/rainbow]

nodes.speaker: logo
nodes.text: how would I know? I'm just a dialogue system!
